login.welcome: Come on, log in to your GroApp account

cancelled.title: Sign in cancelled!
cancelled.subtitle: Login was cancelled. You can sign in again anytime.

email_wa.label: Email or WhatsApp Number
email_wa.placeholder: Enter your email or WhatsApp number

errors.empty: You haven’t entered your email or WhatsApp number yet. Please complete it to continue logging in.
errors.format: The format doesn’t look right yet. Try using a valid email or WhatsApp number that starts with 08 or a country code (+).
errors.not_found: We haven't found an account with that information. Please check your email or WhatsApp number again, or register a new account if you don't have one.

errors.empty: Password is missing. Please fill it in to access your account.
errors.mismatch: Your password doesn't match. Please check again and try again.

email_not_found.error: Account not found, please check your email or number again.

password_incorrect.error: Your password doesn’t match yet. You still have {attempts} more tries within 15 minutes.

submit.disabled: Please complete all required fields first.

manual_logout.description: Your session has ended. See you later!

session_expired.title: Session Ended
session_expired.message_72h: For your security, your session automatically ended after 72 hours. Please sign in again to continue.
session_expired.message_30d: For your security, your session automatically ended after 30 days. Please sign in again to continue.

toast.title: Information!
toast.resumed: You're still logged in on this device, feel free to continue where you left off.

active_notice.banner: You’re still logged in on this device, feel free to continue where you left off.

expired_notice.banner: Your session has ended. Please log in again to keep your data secure.

error.mismatch: You still have {attempts} chances in the next 15 minutes.
error.lockout:
Your account is temporarily locked for 15 minutes for security reasons.
You can try again in {mm:ss}.

success.title: Login Successful
success.message: Successfully logged in. Welcome to Groapp.
success.google_message: Successfully logged in with Google. Welcome to Groapp.

checkbox.terms: I have read and agree to the

name.required: Name is required, please fill it in.
name.invalid_char: Character [x] is not allowed. Use letters, spaces, dots (.) or commas (,).

email.required: Email is required, please fill it in.
email.format: Please enter a valid email (example: name@domain.com).
email.duplicate: This email is already used. Try another one or log in.

wa.required: WhatsApp number is required, please fill it in.
wa.format: Please enter a valid WhatsApp number (example: 81234567890).
wa.duplicate: This WhatsApp number is already used. Try another one or log in.

password.required: Password is required, please fill it in.
password.too_short: Password must be at least 8 characters.
password.weak: Password is too weak, try adding letters & numbers.
password.medium: Password is fair, make it stronger with uppercase/lowercase or symbols.
password.strong: Password is strong and ready to use.
password.common: Password is too common. Please choose another one.
password.guide: Use ≥8 characters. Must include letters & numbers, symbols optional.
password.confirm_required: Confirm password is required, please fill it in.
password.mismatch: Password and confirmation do not match. Please check again.

terms.required: You need to agree to the Privacy Policy & Terms of Service.

global.title: Failed!
global.submit: Some fields are invalid. Please check the highlighted sections.

option_email.label: Sign in with Email
option_email.desc: Sends a registration verification link to your email

option_whatsapp.label: Sign in with WhatsApp
option_whatsapp.desc: Sends a registration verification code to your WhatsApp

otp_whatsapp.message: {otp_code} is your GroApp account verification code. This code is valid for 5 minutes. Please don’t share it with anyone. If you didn’t request this code, please ignore this message or contact the GroApp support team.

form.label: OTP Code
form.instruction: Enter the 6-digit OTP sent to your WhatsApp.

error.invalid_with_resend: Invalid OTP. Check again, or request a new code.
error.expired: OTP has expired. Please request a new one to continue.
error.lock: For security reasons, verification is temporarily locked. Please try again in 15 minutes.

fallback.sent_email: A verification link has been sent to your Email.

banner.title: For security reasons, verification is temporarily locked
banner.message: Try again after 15 minutes or change your WhatsApp number.

toast.message: Verification successful. You may continue your activity.

error.locked: For your security, verification is temporarily locked. Please try again after 15 minutes.
error.limit_reached: Too many OTP attempts. Please verify via Email to continue.
error.limit_reached_subtitle: Please verify via Email to continue

toast.title: Success!
toast.message: Registration completed successfully. You can now explore GroApp.

success.title: Verification Successful
success.message: Your account is now active. We’re glad to support your journey.
success.redirect: You will be redirected automatically in {xx} seconds.

verification_issue_wa.lead: It looks like WhatsApp verification is having an issue. To keep things moving, let’s switch to Email.

check_email.description: We’ve sent a verification link to the email address you registered.
check_email.description_2: sent a verification link to the email address

help.check_spam: Be sure to also check your spam or promotions folder.
help.didnt_get_email_few_minutes: It may take a few minutes for the email to arrive in your inbox.

verify.subject: Verify Your Email Address
verify.preheader: Click the link below to verify your email.
verify.heading: Verify Your Email

body.intro: Hello, we’ve received a request to verify your email address. Click the button below to complete the verification process.

footer.disclaimer: If you did not request this verification, please ignore this email.

success.message: A verification link has been sent. Please check your email.
success.title: Email Verification Successful

invalid_old_link.title: Link No Longer Active
invalid_old_link.message: It looks like you opened an older link. Please use the latest verification link we sent to your email.

button.label: Resend Link
button.success_message: A new link has been sent.

wa_first.message: To keep your account secure and ensure uninterrupted access, you’ll be asked to verify your WhatsApp in {d} days. You can also complete it now.

email_first.message: To keep your account secure and ensure uninterrupted access, you’ll be asked to verify your Email in {d} days. You can also complete it now.

modal.title: Additional Verification Required
modal.description: To help keep your account secure, we need to verify your second identity before you continue.

info.title: Re-verification Required
info.verif_2nd_identity: After this, we will verify your 2nd identity to ensure your account remains secure and access runs smoothly.
info.description30d: Your login session has been active for 30 days and needs to be re-verified.
info.description72h: Your login session has been active for 72 hours and needs to be re-verified.

body.description: This verification helps keep your account secure and ensures that only you can access it. Please enter your password to continue.

success.toast_message: We’ve sent the latest OTP to your WhatsApp.

limit.title: Resend limit reached.
limit.message: You may wait 15 minutes or change your WhatsApp number.

modal.title: Change WhatsApp Number
modal.subtitle: Please enter a new WhatsApp number that has never been used to make the next process smoother.

error.required: WhatsApp number is required, please fill it in.
error.invalid_format: Please use a valid WhatsApp number (e.g., 81234567890).
error.already_used: This number is already in use. Try another active number.
error.same_as_old: This number is the same as your previous one. Please use a different number.

success.message: We've sent an OTP to your new number.

success.toast_message: A new verification link has been sent.

limit.title: Resend limit reached.
limit.message: Please wait 15 minutes or update your email address.

success.title: Email Verification Successful
success.message: Please return to the app or your previous tab to continue your activity. Or, you can go back to the Home page.

invalid_old_link.message_1: It looks like you opened an older link. Please use the

invalid_old_email.title: Link No Longer Active
invalid_old_email.message: It looks like you opened a link from an old email address. Please check your latest email to continue verification.

modal.title: Change Email
modal.subtitle: Please enter your new email. Make sure it’s not already in use or the same as your previous email.

error.email_invalid_format: Please enter a valid email (e.g., name@domain.com).
error.email_already_used: This email is already in use. Try another one active email.
error.email_same_as_previous: This email is the same as your previous one. Please use a different email.

message.info: This verification link is no longer valid.

toast.success: A new verification link has been sent to your email.
toast.title: Registration Expired
toast.message: Registration not found or has expired. Please log in or register again.

verification_issue_email.lead: It looks like email verification is having an issue. To keep things moving, let’s switch to WhatsApp.

limit.message: Too much request for verification link. To continue, please verify via WhatsApp.
limit.message_subtitle: To continue, please verify via WhatsApp

idconfirm.title: Identity Confirmation
idconfirm.description: We found that this Google email is already linked to your existing account. For your security, let’s verify that this is really you.
idconfirm.info_otp: OTP has been sent to your WhatsApp: {08-****-1234}

error.title: Failed to Open Google Pop-up
error.message: There was an issue opening the Google login window. Please try again later, or use manual login to continue.

unregistered_google_account_message: The selected Google account is not registered. You may proceed to create a new account.

unregistered_google_account.message: The selected Google account is not registered. You may proceed to create a new account.

dashboard.hero_title: All GroApp access in one integrated dashboard.
dashboard.hero_subtitle: Choose quick actions to manage users, roles, and permissions without changing pages.
dashboard.section_subtitle: Select the module you want to open based on your operational needs.
dashboard.card_access_desc: Manage user access, roles, and application permission status.
dashboard.card_accounting_desc: Monitor transactions, financial reports, and operational journals.

modal.title: Refresh Your Session
modal.description: Your session has reached the 72-hour limit. Let's do a quick verification to keep things secure. Please enter your password to continue.

info_hint.title: Tips!
info_hint.message: Enable "remember me" when signing in so you don't need to refresh your session too often.

modal.title: Refresh Your Session
modal.description: Your session has reached 30 days. Let's do a quick verification to keep things secure. Please enter your password to continue.

info_hint.title: Tips!
info_hint.message: To keep your account secure, we periodically need to reverify your identity.

error.empty: Password is required. Please fill it in so you can continue.
error.wrong_attempt1: The password doesn't match yet. Try again — you still have 2 tries.
error.wrong_attempt2: Still not a match. Please check once more — you have 1 try left.

error_wrong_password_attempt3.title: Failed!
error_wrong_password_attempt3.message: For your security, your session has ended and you need to sign in again.

success_session_renewed.title: Success!
success_session_renewed.message: Your session has been refreshed. You're good to go.

modal.title: Refresh Your Session
modal.description: Your session has reached the 72-hour limit. Let's do a quick check with Google so everything stays secure without typing your password.

success_session_renewed.title: Success!
success_session_renewed.message: Your session has been refreshed. You're good to go.
